confirmation.detail: inbox envelope env_7124588f-fa33-4bdd-8a97-225899a2a07c read back as received

observed_sequence: narada sites doctor reported ready_missing_role_binding and suggested narada operator-surface agent instantiate --site <CPY/.narada> ...
Execution with --cwd <CPY/.narada> succeeded and doctor then reported fully_idle.
proposed_corrective_action: Generated next_command from sites doctor should include --cwd equal to the target Site root when the command will mutate Site-local state.
operator-surface agent instantiate should fail closed or warn when --site resolves to a different Site root than --cwd and the target registry would not live under --site.
Dry-run output should explicitly classify registry_path as target_site_local or caller_context so the operator sees authority locus before execute.
proposed_preventive_action: Add regression coverage for invoking operator-surface agent instantiate from Narada proper against an external client Site root.
Update first-time client Site onboarding docs to show numbered operator choices and exact CLI commands with --cwd when subsequent local Site mutation is intended.
Consider a higher-level client onboarding command that runs bootstrap, doctor, and local architect identity admission without exposing this footgun.
payload.risk: A fresh operator or architect following the generated next_command can mutate the caller clone's operator-surface identity registry instead of the target Site's registry. This violates authority-locus expectations and creates hidden cross-Site state leakage.
payload.summary: During CPY client Site setup, bootstrap-client worked coherently, but the next doctor command suggested operator-surface agent instantiate. Running instantiate from the Narada proper CLI clone with --site pointing at CPY but without --cwd would have written the identity into Narada proper's operator-surfaces/identities.json. Re-running with --cwd set to the CPY .narada root correctly targeted the CPY Site registry.
payload.title: Client Site onboarding can admit operator-surface identity into wrong registry without explicit --cwd
